creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
While I have 'nvidia-driver' locked the PKG INSTALL tries to install other version of 'nvidia-driver' ...

% pkg lock -l
Currently locked packages:
firefox-50.0_2,1
nvidia-driver-346.96
virtualbox-ose-5.1.8
virtualbox-ose-kmod-5.1.8



% pkg install sqlite3 liblangtag libgpg-error
